title: CatalogSkillWire
description: The wire projection of an engine Skill, served in a v1 catalog pull. The ETag content projection hashes exactly the seven required fields; a source MAY carry additional fields — including the optional `skills` — (a conforming client ignores unknown ones), but none may carry a secret.

name.description: kebab-case, unique within the project's resolved set

tools.description: referenced tool ids, resolved against the client-owned registry

skills.description: referenced skill ids — a dependency edge resolved against the same resolved set; carried on the wire but NOT part of the ETag content projection (a dep-only edit does not bust the ETag)
